zh.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可文費爾德
zh.Letheringham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可列黑林加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington於大約1279年出生在英國素福爾可文費爾德時，他的父親Thomas Wingfield38歲，母親Alice de Weyland26歲。他於1293年之前與Anne Pêche在英國素福爾可文費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1337年3月7日在英國素福爾可丹寧頓享年59歲。

zh-hans.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可文費爾德
zh-hans.Letheringham, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可列黑林加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington于大约1279年出生在英国素福爾可文費爾德时，他的父亲Thomas Wingfield38岁，母亲Alice de Weyland26岁。他于1293年之前与Anne Pêche在英国素福爾可文費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1337年3月7日在英国素福爾可丹寧頓享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a respelling of   Laura  , that coincides in form with the German spelling of the same name and also with the medieval English given name.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington was born about 1279, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Wingfield, was 38 and his mother, Alice de Weyland, was 26. He married Anne Pêche before 1293, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 7 March 1337, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington est né environ 1279, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wingfield, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Alice de Weyland, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Anne Pêche avant 1293, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 7 mars 1337, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington um 1279 in Wingfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Wingfield 38 und seine Mutter Alice de Weyland 26. Er hat vor 1293 in Wingfield, Suffolk, England Anne Pêche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 7. März 1337 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Dennington, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington è nato il circa 1279 nel Wingfield, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Wingfield, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Weyland, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Anne Pêche prima del 1293, nel Wingfield, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 7 marzo 1337, nel Dennington, Suffolk, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクウィングフィールド
ja.Dennington, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクデニントン
ja.Letheringham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクレスエリンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Denningtonが約1279年にイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas Wingfieldは38歳，母Alice de Weylandは26歳であった。1293年以前にイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドでAnne Pêcheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1337年3月7日にイギリススフォルクデニントンで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington(이)가 대략 1279년 영국 수폴크 윙필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Wingfield(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Weyland(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1293년 이전 영국 수폴크 윙필드에서 Anne Pêche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1337년 3월 7일 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington nasceu aproximadamente 1279, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wingfield, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Weyland, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Pêche antes 1293, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 7 de março de 1337, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington родился около 1279 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Wingfield было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Weyland, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Pêche перед 1293 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 7 марта 1337 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Lord John de Wingfield I, Lord of Wingfield and Dennington nació aproximadamente 1279, en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wingfield, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Alice de Weyland, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Anne Pêche antes de 1293, en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 7 de marzo de 1337, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
